g.text: Tic Tac Toe Game (Annotated for Interview)
Trace: "Player1 (X) places at row 0, col 0. Board updated. Check row, col, diagonals for win. No winner yet. Player2 (O) turn."
Owns the board, two players, two pieces,
Adds players to deque, creates 3x3 Board."
2. Get free cells — if none, return DRAW
4. Get row, col input from user
5. Validate and place piece on board
8. Push player to back of deque
STEP 2 - Who plays? With what piece?
has a name and a PlayingPiece.
pieceType to X or O respectively."
If cell is nullptr -> place piece, return true.
If cell is occupied -> return false (invalid)."
If empty vector -> board is full -> DRAW."
X, O, or empty, separated by | and ---."
Just push to deque. No code change."
"After each move at (row, col), check if
Are all cells in row == pieceType?
Are all cells in col == pieceType?
that the last move touches.** No need to
scan the entire board. O(N) per move."
deque round-robin. Each turn: validate move,
place piece on 3x3 Board, check row + col +
diagonals for win. If board full with no winner
touched by the last move, not entire board.
Player has PlayingPiece (X or O via inheritance)
Board: NxN grid of PlayingPiece*, addPiece + getFreeCells
Deque pops front, pushes back for turn rotation
Check row + col + main diagonal + anti-diagonal
Loop: print -> get input -> validate -> place -> check win
: Only check the row/col/diag that the last move touches. O(N) not O(N^2).
